title: cytisus cantabricus
intro: Cytisus cantabricus, also known as Cantabric broom, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Cytisus cantabricus include its potential to support cardiovascular health, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties, although more research is needed to confirm these effects. Cytisus cantabricus is prepared as a tea or infusion, and it has also been used in traditional herbal remedies, but its use should be approached with caution and under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
